
### Setup and Inputs

```{r setup}

rm(list = ls())
gc()

library("tidyr")
library("lmerTest")
library("moments")
library("here")
library("ggplot2")
library("scales")
library("dplyr")
library("data.table")
library("tidymodels")
library("rsample")
library("finetune")
library("forcats")
library("vip")
library("xgboost")
library("pdp")
library("patchwork")
library("shapviz")
library("mice")
library("mgcv")
library("reshape2")

options(scipen=999)
options(width = 200)
options(DT.options = list(warn = FALSE))

```


```{r inputs}

# Get folder location of the data
folder_location <- here("data", "export")
model_folder <- here("data", "models")

# Read in the primary data used for Galvanic II modeling
source_df <- fread(here(folder_location, "ads_us.csv"))
full_df <- fread(here(folder_location, "ads_us_full.csv"))
emotion_df <- fread(here(folder_location, "ads_us_emotions.csv"))

# Preliminary preparation and defining columns for feature engineering
FIXED_COLUMNS <- c(
  "session_id", "session_in", "session_out", "phasic_ads", "ars_ads",
  "ads_comparison", "segment_number", "ad_position", "program_country",
  "age_average", "females_pct"
)
IDENT_COLUMNS <- c("session_id", "session_in", "session_out")

modeling_df <- source_df %>% 
  mutate(females_pct = females_pct / 100)

modeling_full_df <- full_df %>% 
  mutate(females_pct = females_pct / 100)

emotion_full_df <- emotion_df %>% 
  mutate(females_pct = females_pct / 100)

```


```{r bayes_tuning_function}

# Create a helper function to save tuned XGBoost models
xgb_tuning <- function(workflow, resamples, param_info, cache_path, seed = 3825) {
  
  # Create the directory if needed
  cache_dir <- dirname(cache_path)
  if (!dir.exists(cache_dir)) {
    dir.create(cache_dir, recursive = TRUE)
    message("Created folder: ", cache_dir)
  }
  
  # Check cache
  if (file.exists(cache_path)) {
    message("Loading cached model from: ", cache_path)
    return(readRDS(cache_path))
  }
  
  # Run tuning
  message("Running Bayesian tuning...")
  set.seed(seed)
  tuned_result <- tune_bayes(
    workflow,
    resamples = resamples,
    initial = 15,
    iter = 30,
    param_info = param_info,
    metrics = metric_set(rmse, rsq),
    control = control_bayes(verbose = TRUE, no_improve = 10)
  )
  
  # Save and return
  saveRDS(tuned_result, cache_path)
  message("Saved tuned model to: ", cache_path)
  return(tuned_result)
  
}

```


```{r pdp_function}

generate_pdp_plots <- function(fit, baked_data, target_col, features, color) {
  pdp_plots <- lapply(features, function(feat) {
    partial(
      fit$fit,
      pred.var = feat,
      train = as.data.frame(baked_data %>% select(-all_of(target_col))),
      type = "regression",
      plot = FALSE
    )
  })
  
  plot_list <- lapply(seq_along(features), function(i) {
    ggplot() +
      geom_line(data = pdp_plots[[i]], 
                aes(x = .data[[features[i]]], y = yhat),
                color = color, linewidth = 1) +
      geom_rug(data = baked_data, 
               aes(x = .data[[features[i]]]),
               alpha = 0.1, sides = "b") +
      labs(title = features[i], x = NULL, y = "Partial Dependence") +
      scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.0001)) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 8),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
        plot.margin = margin(5, 10, 5, 10)
      )
  })
  
  wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 3)
}

```


```{r interaction_matrix}

get_interaction_table <- function(shap_int, prepped_data, top_n = 15) {
  int_matrix <- shap_int$S_inter
  n_features <- ncol(prepped_data)
  feature_names <- colnames(prepped_data)
  interaction_strength <- matrix(0, n_features, n_features)
  
  for (i in 1:n_features) {
    for (j in 1:n_features) {
      interaction_strength[i, j] <- mean(abs(int_matrix[, i, j]))
    }
  }
  
  rownames(interaction_strength) <- feature_names
  colnames(interaction_strength) <- feature_names
  
  int_df <- melt(interaction_strength) %>%
    mutate(Var1 = as.character(Var1), Var2 = as.character(Var2)) %>%
    filter(Var1 < Var2) %>%
    arrange(desc(value)) %>%
    head(top_n)
  
  return(int_df)
}

```


```{r dependence_plot}

plot_shap_dependence <- function(
    shap_obj, var,
    color_var, 
    title = NULL,
    x_label = NULL,
    color_label = NULL,
    palette = "plasma"
) {
  
  if (is.null(title)) title <- paste0("SHAP: ", var, " × ", color_var)
  if (is.null(x_label)) x_label <- var
  if (is.null(color_label)) color_label <- color_var
  
  sv_dependence(shap_obj, v = var, color_var = color_var) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.position = "right"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = x_label,
      y = "SHAP Value",
      color = color_label
    ) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = palette)
}

```


### Data Exploration

```{r data_modification}

# Create a dataset with subset of variables
information_df <- modeling_full_df %>% 
  select(
    "session_id", "session_in", "session_out", "phasic_ads", "ars_ads",
    "avg_intonation_score", "avg_speaking_rate", "avg_loudness",
    "avg_male_confidence", "avg_estimated_age", "neutrality_pct", "happiness_pct"
  ) %>% 
  mutate(across(c("neutrality_pct", "happiness_pct"), ~ .x / 100))

# Impute the missing values from average intonation and average speaking rate using MICE
winsorize_vars <- c("avg_speaking_rate", "avg_loudness", "avg_intonation_score", "avg_estimated_age")
imputed <- mice(information_df, m = 1, method = "pmm", seed = 3825)
information_df <- complete(imputed) %>% 
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(winsorize_vars),
      ~ case_when(
        .x > quantile(.x, 0.995, na.rm = TRUE) ~ quantile(.x, 0.995, na.rm = TRUE),
        .x < quantile(.x, 0.005, na.rm = TRUE) ~ quantile(.x, 0.005, na.rm = TRUE),
        TRUE ~ .x
      )
    )
  )

```


```{r data_visualization}

# Examine the histogram for each of the variable
vars <- c(
  "phasic_ads", "ars_ads", "avg_intonation_score", "avg_speaking_rate", 
  "avg_loudness", "avg_male_confidence", "avg_estimated_age",
  "neutrality_pct", "happiness_pct"
)

for (var in vars) {
  p <- ggplot(information_df, aes(x = .data[[var]])) +
    geom_histogram(fill = "steel blue") +
    xlab(var) +
    ylab("Count") +
    ggtitle(paste("Histogram of", var)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
    scale_y_continuous(label = comma)
  
  print(p)
}

```


### Random Effect Models

```{r lmer_elm}

phasic_elm <- lmer(
  phasic_ads ~ avg_intonation_score + avg_speaking_rate + avg_loudness + 
    avg_male_confidence + avg_estimated_age + neutrality_pct + happiness_pct + (1 | session_id),
  data = information_df
)
summary(phasic_elm)

ars_elm <- lmer(
  ars_ads ~ avg_intonation_score + avg_speaking_rate + avg_loudness + 
    avg_male_confidence + avg_estimated_age + neutrality_pct + happiness_pct + (1 | session_id),
  data = information_df
)
summary(ars_elm)

```


```{r control_models}

# Fit the control models using the LMER and extract residuals
random_df <- modeling_full_df %>% 
  select(
    session_id, session_in, session_out, phasic_ads, ars_ads, segment_number,
    ad_position, program_format, age_average, females_pct
  ) %>% 
  mutate(program_format = fct_relevel(program_format, "Sports", "Scripted", "Unscripted"))

control_phasic <- lmer(
  phasic_ads ~ segment_number + ad_position + program_format + 
    age_average + females_pct + (1 | session_id),
  data = random_df
)

control_ars <- lmer(
  ars_ads ~ segment_number + ad_position + program_format + 
    age_average + females_pct + (1 | session_id),
  data = random_df
)

# Add the residuals back into the dataset
random_df <- random_df %>% 
  mutate(
    "phasic_resid" = residuals(control_phasic),
    "ars_resid" = residuals(control_ars)
  ) %>% 
  select("session_id", "session_in", "session_out", "phasic_resid", "ars_resid")

summary(control_phasic)
summary(control_ars)

```


```{r lm_elm}

# Combine the residual data into the modeling dataset
resid_df <- information_df %>% 
  left_join(random_df, by = c("session_id", "session_in", "session_out"))

phasic_resid_model <- lm(
  phasic_resid ~ avg_intonation_score + avg_speaking_rate + avg_loudness + 
    avg_male_confidence + avg_estimated_age + neutrality_pct + happiness_pct,
  data = resid_df
)
summary(phasic_resid_model)

ars_resid_model <- lm(
  ars_resid ~ avg_intonation_score + avg_speaking_rate + avg_loudness + 
    avg_male_confidence + avg_estimated_age + neutrality_pct + happiness_pct,
  data = resid_df
)
summary(ars_resid_model)

```


### Generalized Additive Model

```{r gam_elm}

phasic_gam <- gam(
  phasic_ads ~ s(avg_intonation_score) + s(avg_speaking_rate) + s(avg_loudness) + 
    s(avg_male_confidence) + s(avg_estimated_age) + s(neutrality_pct) + s(happiness_pct) +
    s(session_id, bs = "re"),
  data = information_df
)
summary(phasic_gam)
plot(phasic_gam, pages = 1)

ars_gam <- gam(
  ars_ads ~ s(avg_intonation_score) + s(avg_speaking_rate) + s(avg_loudness) + 
    s(avg_male_confidence) + s(avg_estimated_age) + s(neutrality_pct) + s(happiness_pct) +
    s(session_id, bs = "re"),
  data = information_df
)
summary(ars_gam)
plot(ars_gam, pages = 1)

```


```{r gam_resid}

phasic_resid_gam <- gam(
  phasic_resid ~ s(avg_intonation_score) + s(avg_speaking_rate) + s(avg_loudness) + 
    s(avg_male_confidence) + s(avg_estimated_age) + s(neutrality_pct) + s(happiness_pct) +
    s(session_id, bs = "re"),
  data = resid_df
)
summary(phasic_resid_gam)
plot(phasic_resid_gam, pages = 1)

ars_resid_gam <- gam(
  ars_resid ~ s(avg_intonation_score) + s(avg_speaking_rate) + s(avg_loudness) + 
    s(avg_male_confidence) + s(avg_estimated_age) + s(neutrality_pct) + s(happiness_pct) +
    s(session_id, bs = "re"),
  data = resid_df
)
summary(ars_resid_gam)
plot(ars_resid_gam, pages = 1)

```


### Gradient Boosting Models - Full Models

```{r full_model_prep}

# Split the dataset into both phasic and ars
phasic_full_df <- information_df %>% select(-c("session_id", "session_in", "session_out", "ars_ads"))
ars_full_df <- information_df %>% select(-c("session_id", "session_in", "session_out", "phasic_ads"))

# Create recipe for trainer
phasic_recipe <- recipe(phasic_ads ~ ., data = phasic_full_df) %>% 
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors(), one_hot = TRUE)
ars_recipe <- recipe(ars_ads ~ ., data = ars_full_df) %>% 
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors(), one_hot = TRUE)

# Create model spec for both trainers
xgb_spec <- boost_tree(
  trees = tune(),
  tree_depth = tune(),
  min_n = tune(),
  learn_rate = tune(),
  loss_reduction = tune(),
  sample_size = tune()
) %>% 
  set_engine("xgboost") %>% 
  set_mode("regression")

xgb_params <- xgb_spec %>% 
  extract_parameter_set_dials() %>% 
  update(
    trees = trees(range = c(100, 1000)),
    tree_depth = tree_depth(range = c(3, 10)),
    min_n = min_n(range = c(2, 20)),            
    learn_rate = learn_rate(range = c(-3, -1)),
    loss_reduction = loss_reduction(range = c(-7, -2)),
    sample_size = sample_prop(range = c(0.5, 1.0))
  )

# Create the workflow used for both trainers
phasic_workflow <- workflow() %>% add_recipe(phasic_recipe) %>%  add_model(xgb_spec)
ars_workflow <- workflow() %>% add_recipe(ars_recipe) %>% add_model(xgb_spec)

# Create cross-validation fold for both trainers
phasic_cv <- vfold_cv(phasic_full_df, v = 10, strata = phasic_ads)
ars_cv <- vfold_cv(ars_full_df, v = 10, strata = ars_ads)

```


```{r full_model_tuning}

# Tune models and save as cache
phasic_tuned <- xgb_tuning(
  phasic_workflow,
  phasic_cv,
  xgb_params,
  here(model_folder, "phasic_full_elm.rds")
)

ars_tuned <- xgb_tuning(
  ars_workflow,
  ars_cv,
  xgb_params,
  here(model_folder, "ars_full_elm.rds")
)

# Select best parameters and create workflow
phasic_params <- select_best(phasic_tuned, metric = "rmse")
phasic_selected <- finalize_workflow(phasic_workflow, phasic_params)

ars_params <- select_best(ars_tuned, metric = "rmse")
ars_selected <- finalize_workflow(ars_workflow, ars_params)

# Fit the final models
xgb_phasic <- fit(phasic_selected, data = phasic_full_df)
xgb_ars <- fit(ars_selected, data = ars_full_df)

```


```{r variables_importance}

# Extract variable importance out into a table
phasic_importance <- xgb_phasic %>% extract_fit_parsnip() %>% vi() %>% arrange(desc(Importance))
ars_importance <- xgb_ars %>% extract_fit_parsnip() %>% vi() %>% arrange(desc(Importance))

# Plot out the variable importance graphs
phasic_importance %>%
  head(20) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(Variable, Importance), y = Importance)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Phasic Ads Variables Importance",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Importance (Gain)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ars_importance %>%
  head(20) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(Variable, Importance), y = Importance)) +
  geom_col(fill = "darkorange") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Ars Ads Variables Importance",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Importance (Gain)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```


```{r pdp_plots}

# Extract the fitted model from workflows
phasic_fit <- extract_fit_parsnip(xgb_phasic)
ars_fit <- extract_fit_parsnip(xgb_ars)

# Prep training data through the recipe
phasic_baked <- phasic_recipe %>% prep() %>% bake(new_data = phasic_full_df)
ars_baked <- ars_recipe %>% prep() %>% bake(new_data = ars_full_df)

# Phasic PDP and ARS PDP
features <- c(
  "avg_intonation_score", "avg_speaking_rate", 
  "avg_loudness", "avg_male_confidence", "avg_estimated_age",
  "neutrality_pct", "happiness_pct"
)
generate_pdp_plots(phasic_fit, phasic_baked, "phasic_ads", features, "steelblue")
generate_pdp_plots(ars_fit, ars_baked, "ars_ads", features, "darkorange")

```


```{r interaction_tables}

# Extract the xgboost engine from the workflow
xgb_phasic_engine <- extract_fit_engine(xgb_phasic)
xgb_ars_engine <- extract_fit_engine(xgb_ars)

# Prep the recipe to get the transformed data matrix
phasic_prepped <- prep(phasic_recipe) %>% bake(new_data = NULL) %>% select(-phasic_ads) %>% as.matrix()
ars_prepped <- prep(ars_recipe) %>% bake(new_data = NULL) %>% select(-ars_ads) %>% as.matrix()

# Create SHAP objects
shap_phasic <- shapviz(xgb_phasic_engine, X_pred = phasic_prepped)
shap_ars <- shapviz(xgb_ars_engine, X_pred = ars_prepped)

# Get interaction tables for both phasic and ars
shap_phasic_int <- shapviz(xgb_phasic_engine, X_pred = phasic_prepped, interactions = TRUE)
get_interaction_table(shap_phasic_int, phasic_prepped)

shap_ars_int <- shapviz(xgb_ars_engine, X_pred = ars_prepped, interactions = TRUE)
get_interaction_table(shap_ars_int, ars_prepped)

```


```{r interaction_plots}

# Dependence plot for phasic model
plot_shap_dependence(shap_phasic, "avg_loudness", "avg_male_confidence")
plot_shap_dependence(shap_phasic, "avg_speaking_rate", "avg_male_confidence")
plot_shap_dependence(shap_phasic, "avg_estimated_age", "avg_male_confidence")
plot_shap_dependence(shap_phasic, "neutrality_pct", "avg_male_confidence")
plot_shap_dependence(shap_phasic, "neutrality_pct", "avg_loudness")

# Dependence plot for ars model
plot_shap_dependence(shap_ars, "avg_intonation_score", "avg_male_confidence")
plot_shap_dependence(shap_ars, "avg_intonation_score", "avg_speaking_rate")
plot_shap_dependence(shap_ars, "avg_intonation_score", "neutrality_pct")
plot_shap_dependence(shap_ars, "avg_loudness", "avg_male_confidence")
plot_shap_dependence(shap_ars, "avg_speaking_rate", "neutrality_pct")

```


```{r pdp_interactions}

# Examine the interactions between Speaking Rate and Gender - Phasic
pd_interaction_phasic <- partial(
  phasic_fit$fit,
  pred.var = c("avg_speaking_rate", "avg_male_confidence"),
  train = as.data.frame(phasic_baked %>% select(-phasic_ads)),
  grid.resolution = 50
)

plotPartial(
  pd_interaction,
  levelplot = TRUE,
  main = "Speaking Rate × Male Gender Confidence",
  xlab = "Avg Speaking Rate",
  ylab = "Male Confidence"
)

# Gender and intonation
# Decide cutoff point for both male and female

```
